body:
Power Rangers Unlimited

This mod aims to bring the amazing world of power rangers to minecraft



The mod is currently in early development there is only one team right now and everything is survival friendly as that is what the aim of the mod is



How to use the Morpher

Once you have crafted the Morpher you just right click it to Morph then if u want to Demorph you just punch the air with the morpher in hand.



How to access the power weapons

you just hold down H to summon them and then let go of H to unequip them



Enjoy!
